children.name: Charistephane
children.description: Charistephane — a genus of mertensiid comb jellies in the family Mertensiidae.

children.name: Charistephane fugiens
children.description: Charistephane fugiens — a species in the genus Charistephane, family Mertensiidae. Also known as mertensiid comb jellies.
